description_long: This is a medium-sized, round pumpkin with a textured, orange surface and a prominent, dark brown stem at the top. The pumpkin has been intricately carved with a traditional jack-o'-lantern face, featuring large, angular eyes, a triangular nose, and a wide, jagged mouth with pointed teeth. The carving is deep and clean, revealing the inner flesh and giving the face a dramatic, expressive look. The surface of the pumpkin is slightly rough and matte, with visible natural ridges and some minor blemishes. No additional decorative accessories are present, and the pumpkin appears hollowed out, as is typical for carved jack-o'-lanterns. The overall appearance suggests it is intended for seasonal outdoor display, such as on a porch or sidewalk.
description: A carved orange pumpkin with a dark brown stem, featuring a classic jack-o'-lantern face with sharp eyes, nose, and a jagged mouth. The surface is rough and matte, with visible carving details.
description_view_0: The pumpkin is shown with its dark brown stem visible and a partial view of the carved face, with some surface texture and a small blemish on the left.
description_view_1: This view highlights the side of the pumpkin, showing a partial outline of the carved face and the textured orange surface.
description_view_2: The pumpkin is rotated to show more of the carved features, including the edge of the mouth and one eye, with the stem still visible.
description_view_3: The front of the pumpkin displays the full jack-o'-lantern face, with both eyes, the nose, and the jagged mouth clearly visible.
attribute_carving_pattern: Traditional jack-o'-lantern style with large, angular eyes, a triangular nose, and a wide, jagged mouth with pointed teeth. The carving is expressive and deep, with clean cutouts and no additional motifs or abstract elements.
